D.opening_pressure: rushes the room toward a decision before trust catches up
D.healthy_resolution: names the priority and directs action without overpowering the room

I.opening_pressure: turns the discomfort into energy before the real signal is named
I.false_win: perform harder until the room responds
I.healthy_resolution: uses expression to invite clarity and shared movement

S.opening_pressure: absorbs the tension to keep everyone else steady
S.false_win: carry the pressure silently so the room stays calm
S.healthy_resolution: names what support is needed and keeps the group steady without disappearing

C.opening_pressure: tightens standards until uncertainty has nowhere to hide
C.false_win: delay movement until every variable is controlled
C.healthy_resolution: clarifies the next accurate step without freezing the room
